title: BigCommerce API credentials should not be disclosed
description: BigCommerce is an e-commerce platform for online stores. BigCommerce API credentials include client ID, client secret, and access tokens. Exposing these credentials allows full access to store management including products, orders, customers, and payment configurations.
recommendation: Remove BigCommerce credentials from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate immediately in the BigCommerce control panel.
impact: Full e-commerce store access including customer data, order history, product management, and payment settings.

checks.message: BigCommerce access token detected in variable assignment. BigCommerce access tokens provide complete store management access including customer accounts and purchase history, all product catalog data, order management and fulfillment, payment method configurations, and discount/coupon codes. Exposing this token allows exfiltrating all customer PII and order history. Rotate immediately in the BigCommerce control panel under API Accounts.

BigCommerce client secret detected. BigCommerce client secrets authenticate OAuth app installations in stores. Exposing this secret allows impersonating your app to generate access tokens for any store that has installed your app. Rotate in the BigCommerce Developer Portal.
